title: Violet's Menu Review
text:
## Menu Review

Reviewer: Violet, tortie cat and head cat

Tonight's entree was {adjective} {food} served in a {color} bowl at {number} o'clock.

**Aroma:** {adjective}, though someone allowed Matilda to {verb} nearby.

**Texture:** Like a {object} that had been {past-tense verb} by a {job}.

**Service:** Human approached {adverb}, then failed to notice Zebby the black kitten {verb ending in -ing} near the {place}.

**Emotional result:** {emotion}.

**Final verdict:** Replace with {food} and add {number} {plural noun}.
